transcript:
[Meeting date: 2026-06-20]
[00:00] You: Release planning for v3.0. Let's nail down all the milestone dates.
[00:40] Speaker 1: Feature freeze is June 30th. After that, no new features — only bug fixes.
[01:15] Speaker 2: The beta build goes to internal testers on July 7th. We need at least 2 weeks of internal testing before external beta.
[01:55] You: So external beta starts July 21st?
[02:05] Speaker 2: Correct. External beta runs for three weeks, ending August 11th.
[02:35] Speaker 1: The production release is August 18th. We'll need the release notes done a week before launch, so by August 11th.
[03:10] Speaker 3: App Store review typically takes 5 to 7 business days. So we need to submit by August 11th to be safe for August 18th.
[03:50] You: What about localization?
[04:05] Speaker 3: Localization strings freeze on July 15th. Translators need 3 weeks, so translated strings come back by August 5th.
[04:40] Speaker 1: The marketing site update needs to go live on the same day as the app release, August 18th. Speaker 2 needs the content by next Friday, June 27th.
[05:15] Speaker 2: Got it. I'll have the website content ready by June 27th.
[05:35] You: And post-launch we'll do a retrospective. Let's schedule that for sometime in September — not a firm date yet, just soon after launch.

action_items.description: Have website content ready for marketing site update
action_items.source_quote: I'll have the website content ready by June 27th.

decisions: Feature freeze is June 30th — only bug fixes after that

dates.description: External beta end / release notes due
